items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 1 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents
watchItems: 跟进：GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents

items.title: GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents
items.summary: A capability threshold I've been carefully monitoring.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
